utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now, check if each of these appears in the final package: 
1. destination – present and fully specified (Prague, Czech Republic). 
2. travel_dates – present and fully specified (2024-06-20 to 2024-06-24). 
3. transportation – includes flight details and cost; fully specified. 
4. accommodation – includes hotel details and cost; fully specified. 
5. activities – includes type of activity and cost; fully specified. 
6. additional_services – included with details and cost; fully specified (even if none). 
7. total_budget – included with detailed cost breakdown, currency, and remaining budget; fully specified. 
All 7 items are present and complete according to the format requirements.
